title: MoreFoodz Expanded
description: Adds more foods and drinks into the game!
body:
# Welcome back to the MoreFoodz Universe! Introducing the all new MoreFoodz Expanded!

Gone are the days of having to pick from a tiny list of food! With this mod, more food, drinks, and items are being added in EVERY update! Enjoy a slice of pizza, go on a cheese only diet, or go crazy for some good ole Murican Apple Pie 🦅.



## Whats new in MoreFoodz Expanded? Glad you asked!

We have introduced a brand new trading system! Instead of going around hunting for tomatos, turn one of your villagers into a Culinary Specialist! Need some money? A banker can help!

Remastered Food Items! Your favorite foods from MoreFoodz are back! Most of them have the same texture, but for those of you who wanted an updated pizza model, your time has come!



## Info and Links

This mod was made by Sydney Morrison. All Rights Reserved. This mod may be used in any free modpacks without permission.

Links for days!
Repository: https://lab.hi-im.sydney/root/morefoodz-expanded
Wiki: Coming soon!
